---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for oh-my-copilot
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description
<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like. -->

## Use Case
<!-- Why do you need this feature? What problem does it solve? -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- How do you envision this working? -->

## Alternatives Considered
<!-- Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds? -->

## Component
<!-- Which part of oh-my-copilot does this affect? -->
- [ ] Agents (`agents/*.agent.md`)
- [ ] Skills (`skills/`)
- [ ] Hook scripts (`scripts/`)
- [ ] Extensions SDK (`extensions/`)
- [ ] Database/Memory (`init-memory.sh`, `consolidate.sh`)
- [ ] Testing (`tests/`)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other: 

## Additional Context
<!-- Any other context, mockups, or examples about the feature request. -->
